This addon adds helper methods on the sale.older model that ease the management
and the creation of cart from within odoo code.

:local: true

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_sale_cart.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._find_open_cart
documentation:
Try to find a cart for the given partner_id and uuid.
If no cart is found, try to find another cart for the given partner.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_sale_cart.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._get_default_pricelist_id
documentation:
Return the pricelist to use if no one found on the partner
By default, we return the one defined on the public user (inactive by default).

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_sale_cart.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._play_onchanges_cart
documentation: Play all onchanges bypassing the rules

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_sale_cart.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._create_empty_cart
documentation: Create a new empty cart for a given partner

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_sale_cart.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._get_cart_line
documentation: Return the sale order line of the cart associated to the given product.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_sale_cart.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._transfer_cart
documentation:
Copy the lines of this cart to the current cart of a given partner.
Merge lines of identical products.
If the partner does not have a current cart yet, create one.
This cart is not deleted.
It is the responsibility of the caller to remove it if desired.
